strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: Lack of explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience despite required stack
Limited evidence of Kotlin/Java usage in recent roles despite secondary requirement
German language proficiency is only basic, potentially hindering collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep full-stack expertise, strong AI-agent exposure, and a proven track record in building scalable, test-driven systems — aligning closely with core responsibilities. His open-source work and tooling mindset reflect the process-improvement culture needed. However, the absence of confirmed Nest.js or Vitest usage and minimal Kotlin/Java evidence are notable gaps, though mitigated by his adaptability and broad language proficiency.
